ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF. All fields clearly legible.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF. All fields clearly legible.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number is 'SEG-26D-464763' which does not contain an LC-related bank term label. Verification proceeds according to all checkpoints in section 4.

locations_found.location: Footer address block: 'Källbergs Industri AB, Skövdevägen 25, Box 73, 54522 Töreboda, Sverige'
locations_found.context: Invoice issuer/seller address block at bottom of invoice page
Company logo/brand name in top-right header of invoice

consignor_search_step2b.conclusion: Certifikatets consignor 'Källbergs Industri AB' kan uttryckligen identifieras i fakturan i footer-adressblocket och i sidhuvudets logotyp/varumärke.

criteria_met: Consignor 'Källbergs Industri AB' identified in invoice footer and header branding.
Consignee 'Kewpie Egg Corporation' identified as invoice buyer ('Invoice to') and Ship-to address.
pairing_validation.motivation: At least two of three pairing criteria are met: consignor is the invoice issuer, and consignee is the invoice buyer. Document pair is valid.

candidates.section: Box 8 - Place and date of issue

checkpoints.certificate_value: Källbergs Industri AB, Box 73, SE-545 22, TÖREBODA, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: Källbergs Industri AB, Skövdevägen 25, Box 73, 54522 Töreboda, Sverige

comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignor name in all invoice files.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate consignor 'Källbergs Industri AB' found explicitly in invoice footer address block ('Källbergs Industri AB, Skövdevägen 25, Box 73, 54522 Töreboda, Sverige') and in header branding ('KÄLLBERGS'). Name matches exactly after normalization.

comparison_steps.description: Verify that consignor company name in certificate can be identified in invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'Källbergs Industri AB'. Invoice footer: 'Källbergs Industri AB'. Exact match after normalization.

comparison_steps.description: Verify that consignor country matches between certificate and invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice footer: 'Sverige' (Swedish for Sweden). Normalized: both = Sweden. Additionally, VAT number prefix 'SE' confirms Sweden per rule 4.1.2.1.

rules_applied.description: Group structure - consignor name found explicitly in invoice footer and header branding.
Country verification via indirect identifier - VAT prefix SE confirms Sweden.
Country check - Sweden (certificate) = Sverige (invoice), normalized match.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Källbergs Industri AB' with country 'Sweden'. Invoice is issued by 'Källbergs Industri AB' (found in footer address block with full address 'Skövdevägen 25, Box 73, 54522 Töreboda, Sverige') and also identified in header branding as 'KÄLLBERGS'. Company name matches exactly. Country: certificate says 'Sweden', invoice footer says 'Sverige' (Swedish language equivalent), and VAT prefix 'SE' confirms Sweden. MATCH on both name and country.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Kewpie Egg Corporation, 2-5-7 Sengawacho, Chofu-shi, Tokyo 182-0002, Japan
checkpoints.invoice_value: Kewpie Egg Corporation, 2-5-7 Sengawa-cho, Chofu-Shi, Tokyo 182 0002, Japan

comparison_steps.description: Identify the primary billing/buyer party in the invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Invoice top-left block (buyer/invoice-to): 'Kewpie Egg Corporation, 2-5-7 Sengawa-cho, Chofu-Shi, Tokyo 182 0002, Japan'. This is the primary billing party.
Certificate: 'Kewpie Egg Corporation'. Invoice buyer: 'Kewpie Egg Corporation'. Exact match.
Certificate: 'Japan'. Invoice buyer address: 'Japan'. Exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Note address differences per rule 4.2.4 (differences in street address do not cause MISMATCH).
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'Sengawacho' vs Invoice: 'Sengawa-cho' — minor hyphenation difference in Japanese transliteration. Certificate: '182-0002' vs Invoice: '182 0002' — format difference in postal code. Per rule 4.2.4, address differences do not affect MATCH when company name and country match.

rules_applied.description: Priority order - primary billing field (buyer block) used for consignee verification.
Name verification - exact match after normalization.
Address differences (minor transliteration/formatting) do not cause MISMATCH.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Kewpie Egg Corporation' in Japan. Invoice buyer (primary billing field) is also 'Kewpie Egg Corporation' at the same address in Japan. Company name matches exactly. Country matches exactly. Minor address transliteration difference ('Sengawacho' vs 'Sengawa-cho') and postal code format ('182-0002' vs '182 0002') do not affect MATCH per rule 4.2.4. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers for matching.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate does not contain an explicit article number field. The certificate goods description is 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L'. No separate article number is listed in the certificate. Proceeding to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation and match against invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Identity-bearing main designation in certificate: 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L'. Invoice line item 1 description: 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L'. Exact match after normalization of case. All words match in same order: 'Dried', 'Egg', 'Yolk', 'LPL-2L'.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation identified and matched exactly.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description is 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L'. Invoice line item description is 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L'. The identity-bearing main designation is the full string 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L', which matches exactly between the two documents. No normalization needed beyond case. MATCH.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Total Net Weight 3.267 (interpreted as 3267 kg with thousand separator dot)

comparison_steps.description: Verify that certificate quantity includes both numeric value and unit.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate box 7: '3267 kg net'. Numeric value: 3267. Unit: kg. Weight category: net. All required elements present.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '3267 kg net' — this is the verification-basis quantity.
comparison_steps.details: Box 7 value: 3267 kg net weight. This is the sole verification-basis quantity.

comparison_steps.description: Search for numeric value 3267 in invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Invoice states 'Total Net Weight 3.267'. The dot in '3.267' could be a decimal separator (3.267 kg) or a thousand separator (3,267 = 3267 kg). Evaluating context: Invoice line item shows Qty: 3.267, UOM: Kg. The invoice total is EUR 62,073.00 at unit price 19.00/kg. 3.267 × 19.00 = 62.073 ≠ 62,073.00 BUT 3267 × 19.00 = 62,073.00. This confirms that '3.267' in the invoice uses the dot as a THOUSAND SEPARATOR, representing 3,267 kg = 3267 kg. Applying rule 4.4.3.3 (thousand separator normalization): the invoice value 3.267 normalizes to 3267. Certificate value: 3267. Match confirmed.
Certificate: 'net'. Invoice: 'Total Net Weight 3.267'. Both specify net weight. Consistent.

rules_applied.description: Direct identification - numeric value 3267 identified in invoice after thousand separator normalization.
Thousand separator normalization - dot in '3.267' confirmed as thousand separator based on pricing calculation context (3267 × 19.00 = 62,073.00).
Weight category - both certificate and invoice specify net weight.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '3267 kg net'. Invoice shows 'Total Net Weight 3.267' and line item Qty '3.267 Kg'. The dot in the invoice is a thousand separator, not a decimal: 3267 × unit price 19.00 = 62,073.00 which matches the invoice line amount. After normalization per rule 4.4.3.3, both values are 3267. Weight category is net in both documents. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The invoice value 3.267 represents 3.267 kg (decimal interpretation)
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: This would mean the total quantity is about 3.3 kg, which at EUR 19.00/kg would give EUR 62.07 — not EUR 62,073.00 as stated on the invoice. The pricing calculation proves this is a thousand separator, not decimal. 3267 × 19.00 = 62,073.00.

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin statement in invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Invoice contains 'Country of origin: Sweden' below the line item description for 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L'. This is an explicit origin statement.
Certificate box 3: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Exact match, no normalization needed.

rules_applied.description: Origin identification - explicit 'Country of origin: Sweden' found in invoice.
MATCH - origin country explicitly identified and matches.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'Sweden' as country of origin. Invoice explicitly states 'Country of origin: Sweden' on the product line for 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L'. Exact match. MATCH.

evidence.raw_text: Källbergs Industri AB, Box 73, SE-545 22, TÖREBODA, Sweden
Källbergs Industri AB, Skövdevägen 25, Box 73, 54522 Töreboda, Sverige
Kewpie Egg Corporation, 2-5-7 Sengawacho, Chofu-shi, Tokyo 182-0002, Japan
Kewpie Egg Corporation, 2-5-7 Sengawa-cho, Chofu-Shi, Tokyo 182 0002, Japan
Kewpie Egg Corporation, 2-5-7 Sengawa-cho, Chofu-Shi, Tokyo 182 0002, Japan

rule_evaluation_log.details: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate. Certificate number 'SEG-26D-464763' does not contain a bank-term LC reference.
Consignor 'Källbergs Industri AB' found in invoice footer. Consignee 'Kewpie Egg Corporation' found as invoice buyer. At least 2 of 3 criteria met.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Group structure - consignor name search in invoice
rule_evaluation_log.details: Consignor 'Källbergs Industri AB' found explicitly in invoice footer address block and header branding.
Sweden (cert) = Sverige (invoice), normalized to same country.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Consignee priority order - primary billing field
rule_evaluation_log.details: Invoice buyer block identified as primary billing field containing 'Kewpie Egg Corporation'.
Exact match: 'Kewpie Egg Corporation' in both documents.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Address differences do not cause MISMATCH
rule_evaluation_log.details: Minor transliteration difference 'Sengawacho' vs 'Sengawa-cho' and postal code format '182-0002' vs '182 0002' noted but irrelevant per rule.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation
rule_evaluation_log.details: 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L' matches exactly between certificate and invoice.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Direct identification of quantity in invoice
rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate: 3267 kg net. Invoice: Total Net Weight 3.267 (thousand separator dot confirmed by pricing context).
Invoice value '3.267' normalized to 3267 after confirming dot is thousand separator (3267 × 19.00 = 62,073.00 matches invoice amount).
Explicit 'Country of origin: Sweden' found in invoice.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Källbergs Industri AB identifieras som fakturautställare, mottagaren Kewpie Egg Corporation matchar fakturans köpare, varubeskrivningen 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L' är identisk, kvantiteten 3267 kg netto överensstämmer, och ursprungslandet Sverige bekräftas i fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.

summary_of_findings.key_finding: Källbergs Industri AB identified as invoice issuer in footer and header branding. Country Sweden confirmed via 'Sverige' in address and SE-prefix in VAT number.
Kewpie Egg Corporation matches exactly as invoice buyer. Country Japan matches. Minor address transliteration differences are irrelevant.
Identity-bearing main designation 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L' matches exactly between certificate and invoice.
Certificate: 3267 kg net. Invoice: Total Net Weight 3.267 (dot confirmed as thousand separator by pricing context: 3267 × 19.00 = 62,073.00). Values match after normalization.
Sweden in certificate box 3 matches explicit 'Country of origin: Sweden' in invoice.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.certificate_value: Källbergs Industri AB, Box 73, SE-545 22, TÖREBODA, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Källbergs Industri AB, Skövdevägen 25, Box 73, 54522 Töreboda, Sverige (footer) / KÄLLBERGS (header branding)
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) – consignor identifierad i fakturans footer-adressblock och header-branding. Landverifiering via explicit adress ('Sverige') och VAT-prefix ('SE').
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'Källbergs Industri AB' återfinns exakt i fakturans footer-adressblock. Landet 'Sweden' bekräftas av 'Sverige' i adressen samt VAT-prefix 'SE'. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: Kewpie Egg Corporation, 2-5-7 Sengawacho, Chofu-shi, Tokyo 182-0002, Japan
sections.invoice_value: Kewpie Egg Corporation, 2-5-7 Sengawa-cho, Chofu-Shi, Tokyo 182 0002, Japan
sections.rule_applied: Primärt faktureringsfält (4.2.0.2) – consignee verifierad mot fakturans köparblock. Adressdifferenser (translitterering, postnummerformat) påverkar inte bedömningen (4.2.4).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignee 'Kewpie Egg Corporation' matchar exakt fakturans köpare i det primära faktureringsfältet. Landet Japan matchar. Smärre skillnader i adresstranslitterering ('Sengawacho' vs 'Sengawa-cho') och postnummerformat ('182-0002' vs '182 0002') är tillåtna variationer. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning (4.3.3) – identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning identifierad och matchad exakt.
sections.motivation: Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L' återfinns exakt i fakturans varurad. Alla ord matchar i samma ordning. Exakt matchning. MATCH.

sections.invoice_value: Total Net Weight 3.267 (= 3267 kg med punkt som tusentalsavskiljare)
sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll (4.4.1) med tusentalsavskiljare-normalisering (4.4.3.3). Fakturans '3.267' bekräftat som 3267 genom prisberäkning (3267 × 19,00 = 62 073,00 EUR).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet är 3267 kg netto. Fakturan anger 'Total Net Weight 3.267'. Punkten i '3.267' är en tusentalsavskiljare, bekräftat av att 3267 × enhetspris 19,00 = 62 073,00 EUR (fakturans radbelopp). Båda dokumenten anger nettovikt. Värdena matchar exakt efter normalisering. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt identifiering (4.5.1) – explicit ursprungsangivelse i fakturan matchar certifikatets box 3.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 3 anger 'Sweden'. Fakturan innehåller explicit 'Country of origin: Sweden' under varubeskrivraden. Exakt matchning. MATCH.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints evaluated. All statuses are MATCH. Lowest checkpoint confidence is 0.97 (above 0.85 floor). comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent with all MATCH statuses. workflow_recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result.
